intro: Strap in for a high-octane rescue operation where every second counts. In this combat experience, you are dropped behind enemy lines with one objective: survive long enough to escape.
description:
Game Features
Intense Combat: Fight your way through hostile territory using precision and speed to eliminate threats before they pin you down.

8 Handcrafted Levels: Navigate through diverse, meticulously designed environments—from urban ruins to fortified jungle outposts.

The Final Push: Fight toward the extraction zone and hold your ground until the rescue helicopter arrives.

Action-Oriented Gameplay: Optimized for quick sessions and relentless momentum.

Lock, load, and reach the chopper. Your mission starts now.
